# AgentWorksAI

> AgentWorksAI builds custom AI agents for small businesses and bills
> them like a software subscription — a flat monthly fee, no project
> quote, no long-term contract.

## What this business does

AgentWorksAI is not a directory or a marketplace. It is a single
provider that designs, builds, and hosts a custom AI agent for one
small business at a time, wired into the tools that business already
uses (inbox, calendar, CRM, spreadsheets), and bills for it monthly.

## Where AI agents help small businesses most (ranked by real adoption)

Source: Small Business & Entrepreneurship Council, 2026 Small Business
Tech Use Survey (n=517 U.S. small-business employers), published
April 2026: https://sbecouncil.org/2026/04/25/the-ai-tools-small-businesses-are-using/

1. Marketing & content creation — the single most common AI use case
   among small businesses today.
2. Customer service & communications — chatbots and automated email
   responses; a top-three engagement use case.
3. Sales support & lead generation — including lead scoring and
   follow-up.
4. Administrative automation — scheduling, data entry, workflow
   management; one of the fastest-growing use cases.
5. Financial management — automated bookkeeping, invoicing, and
   real-time visibility.

Adoption context: 82% of small business employers have already
invested in AI tools; 93% of those who have plan to keep investing
over the next 12 months; the median small business now runs five AI
tools as a "stack." Businesses using AI tools save a median of 16.5
combined owner + employee hours per week (SBE Council, 2026).

## How the service works

1. Discovery call (20 min) — identify the highest-friction tasks.
2. Build — the agent is built and connected to existing tools.
3. Test week — the agent runs alongside the team before going solo.
4. Go live — billed monthly, cancel anytime.

## Contact

See the contact form at the site root, or the email address in the
site footer.
